title: The CP9 Matchups Are Set
description: Each Straw Hat faces a CP9 opponent while the rescue depends on finding the correct key before Robin reaches the Gate of Justice.
scene: Across pages 14, 15, 16, 17, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Franky, Fukurou. Each Straw Hat faces a CP9 opponent while the rescue depends on finding the correct key before Robin reaches the Gate of Justice.

dialogue.speaker: Fukurou
dialogue.text: It's a key to the Kairouseki Handcuffs

dialogue.speaker: Fukurou
dialogue.text: That nice Nico Robin is restrained with!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Kairouseki is as hard as diamond,

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: So her handcuffs will never come off.

dialogue.speaker: Fukurou
dialogue.text: Forget about him and let's hurry!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: We're just giving you a chance.

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: We can just let Luffy go ahead.

summary: Each Straw Hat faces a CP9 opponent while the rescue depends on finding the correct key before Robin reaches the Gate of Justice.
